creator: satherrl@dssrg.curtin.edu.au
text:
The version of MHonArc currently listed in ports is 2.3.3
the latest available source is 2.4.5 - can somebody update this?

Fix: 

Avoid users who want the latest MHonArc installed,
tell them to use 2.3.3,
manually install 2.4.5 (it's been so long i've forgotten how),
ask someone else to fix the port :-)
